allow: Bash(sed -i 's/import type { AuthRequest } from "..\\/types";//g' src/routes/leaderboard.ts src/routes/questions.ts src/routes/rooms.ts)
Bash(sed -i 's/: AuthRequest/: Request/g' src/routes/leaderboard.ts src/routes/questions.ts src/routes/rooms.ts src/routes/sessions.ts src/routes/users.ts src/routes/store.ts)
Bash(sed -i 's/import type { AuthRequest, DbGameSession } from "..\\/types"/import type { DbGameSession } from "..\\/types"/g' src/routes/sessions.ts)
Bash(sed -i 's/import type { AuthRequest, DbUser } from "..\\/types"/import type { DbUser } from "..\\/types"/g' src/routes/store.ts src/routes/users.ts)

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/admin" -UseBasicParsing; if \($response.Content -match "Generate Questions"\) { "✅ Generate Questions button IS in the page" } else { "❌ Generate Questions button NOT found in page" }; if \($response.Content -match "overflow-y-auto"\) { "❌ overflow-y-auto still present" } else { "✅ overflow-y-auto removed" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; $r = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/admin" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 } catch { $null }; if \($r -and $r.Content -match "Generate Questions"\) { "✅ New admin page is live" } elseif \($r\) { "⚠️ Page loads but still old — still compiling" } else { "⏳ Server not ready yet — give it 10 more seconds" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/admin" -UseBasicParsing; if \($r.Content -match "Generate Questions"\) { "✅ Generate Questions button present" } else { "❌ Missing" }; if \($r.Content -match "overflow-y-auto"\) { "❌ overflow-y-auto still in layout" } else { "✅ Scroll fix applied" })

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\({k:v for k,v in deps.items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in ['nativewind','reanimated','babel','expo']\)}\)")
Bash(heroku" || echo "No standard deployment config found")
